name: dns-security-monitoring-platform
description: Real-time DNS security monitoring with threat detection using Suricata

scripts.backend:install: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python3 main.py
scripts.traffic:generate: cd scripts && pip install -r requirements.txt && python3 generate_dns_traffic.py

author: Security Team
